subcodes.first_line: O distinguished and noble one! Your letter was received, and upon its perusal the morn of gladness dawned from the horizon of the heart, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فاضل جلیل نامه شما رسید و بملاحظه اش صبح شادمانی از افق قلب دمید زیرا دلیل
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
